generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Your local emergency services are being overwhelmed by unnecessary calls. While we all want to be prepared, excessive panic buying and hoarding of emergency supplies is making it harder for those who truly need help. Let's work together to ensure our civil defense systems remain effective for when they're truly needed. #CommunityResilience #PreparedNotPanicked
